qcSource: Author Test Cases - Jodit Editor Test Cases.pdf
host: Extended Response (shortLongAns) — Answer Type RTE + Keyboard Type Advance(JODIT)

legend.automated: Verified in the authoring DOM by an it() block (degrades gracefully when TOCFlag-gated Jodit is absent).
legend.deferred: Documented as it.skip() — requires login/student/CLP, Preview/Reader/Publish, persistence-after-reload, runtime limit/network/read-only behavior, accessibility, or live clipboard/math flows.

mappings.reason: Launch Studio URL + login — environment bootstrap handled by cy.openAuthoringTool, not a component assertion

mappings.it: TC_02 — "Answer type" section is present in the host settings panel
TC_03 — RTE answer-type radio is present (default selection is runtime)
TC_04 — Keyboard-type checkboxes ("Basic"/"Advance") are present under RTE
TC_05/TC_06 — "Basic" keyboard maps to the current Rich Text Editor (default state)
mappings.note: presence automated; default-selected state is runtime

mappings.it: TC_05/TC_06 — "Basic" keyboard maps to the current Rich Text Editor (default state)
mappings.note: Basic maps to the current RTE / ansRTE textarea

mappings.it: TC_07 — Jodit Editor is displayed when "Advanced" (RTE + Advance/JODIT) is selected
TC_08/TC_21/TC_46 — Enabled Jodit toolbar buttons are rendered
TC_09 — Author can switch keyboard type Basic ↔ Advance

mappings.reason: No data loss when switching Basic↔Advanced — runtime data integrity across editor re-mount
No data loss after Preview + Publish (both editors) — Preview/Publish flow outside authoring DOM
No data loss when switching editors before publishing — Publish flow
No data loss when republishing Q&A widgets — Publish/republish flow
Student can access Jodit in CLP — Reader/CLP flow (student login)
Student can use all Jodit buttons — Reader/CLP flow (student login)

mappings.it: TC_16/TC_47 — Only one keyboard type can be selected at a time (radio group)

mappings.reason: Basic→Advanced data displays correctly — runtime data carry-over across editor swap
Advanced→Basic data displays correctly — runtime data carry-over across editor swap
Error handling if editor fails to load — requires simulated load failure

mappings.it: TC_20/TC_37 — Script injection into the editable is not executed
TC_08/TC_21/TC_46 — Enabled Jodit toolbar buttons are rendered
mappings.note: all formatting controls present in toolbar

mappings.it: TC_22 — Editor expands to full screen via the fullsize button
TC_23 — Content is retained after toggling full screen

mappings.reason: Character limit (5000) enforcement — runtime input/limit behavior
Keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+B/Ctrl+I) — runtime focus/selection behavior, build-dependent

mappings.it: TC_26 — Undo and Redo buttons are present and clickable
TC_27 — Text alignment control is present in the toolbar
TC_28 — Bulleted (ul) and numbered (ol) list buttons are present and clickable
TC_29 — Table insert button is present and opens a picker/popup
TC_30 — Link insert button opens the link dialog
TC_31 — Symbol (special character) insert button is present
TC_32 — Font-size and brush (color) controls are present
TC_33 — Clear-formatting (eraser) button is present

mappings.reason: Preview shows all formatting — Preview rendering flow
Copy/paste styled content from Word — runtime clipboard paste (processPaste sanitizer exercised live)

mappings.it: TC_36 — Link dialog accepts URL input (malformed-URL validation is runtime)
TC_20/TC_37 — Script injection into the editable is not executed

mappings.reason: Switch Jodit→Basic with unsupported formatting — runtime graceful-degrade behavior
Editor disabled in read-only / submission-disabled mode — runtime read-only state
Unsupported file upload error — file/image/video buttons are removed (removeButtons); upload not exposed, runtime error N/A
Network failure during auto-save/publish — requires offline simulation
Large paste (>5000 chars) handling — runtime clipboard + limit behavior
Browser back/refresh without data loss — persistence-after-reload

mappings.it: TC_44 — Image onerror / improper HTML does not execute in the editable
mappings.note: DOM-asserted: img onerror does not fire

mappings.it: TC_45 — Toolbar does not break when the viewport is narrowed
TC_08/TC_21/TC_46 — Enabled Jodit toolbar buttons are rendered
mappings.note: author-side toolbar visibility automated; CLP/student-side toolbar visibility deferred (TC_46_CLP in spec)

mappings.it: TC_16/TC_47 — Only one keyboard type can be selected at a time (radio group)

mappings.reason: Switching editor with unsaved changes prompts user — runtime unsaved-changes prompt
Max character-limit warning popup — runtime limit-approach popup
Accessibility: keyboard + screen-reader of toolbar/content — a11y/AT verification in Preview + Reader
No data loss on activity relaunch in the Reader — Reader persistence flow
